categories.brandCount: {count, plural, =0 {No brands} one {# brand} other {# brands}}

descriptions.clothing: Explore Taiwan clothing brands shaped by textile know-how, practical tailoring, and a modern design point of view. From everyday basics to independent labels, these makers show how local craft moves with daily life.
descriptions.bags: Discover bag and leather goods brands from Taiwan, including workshops focused on durable materials, careful stitching, and functional silhouettes. Many balance small-batch production with the island's long relationship with craft manufacturing.
descriptions.food: Browse Taiwan food and snack brands that turn local ingredients, nostalgic flavors, and regional specialties into products ready to travel. This category highlights pantry staples, sweets, and everyday tastes rooted in Taiwanese food culture.
descriptions.beverages: Find Taiwan beverage brands spanning tea, coffee, fruit drinks, and fermented craft. These makers draw from the island's farming regions and cafe culture to create drinks with a clear sense of place.
descriptions.beauty: Explore Taiwanese beauty and skincare brands built around climate-aware formulas, gentle routines, and ingredient transparency. From daily skincare to targeted treatments, these labels reflect a practical approach to care.
descriptions.home: Discover home and living brands from Taiwan making objects for cooking, decorating, storage, and everyday rituals. The best pieces combine useful design with materials and stories that feel distinctly local.
descriptions.stationery: Browse Taiwan stationery and design brands known for paper goods, illustration, writing tools, and thoughtful desk objects. This category reflects the island's strong graphic culture and affection for useful small details.
descriptions.crafts: Explore Taiwan craft and handmade brands where ceramics, textiles, wood, metal, and mixed materials are shaped in small batches. These makers keep traditional skills active while giving them contemporary form.
descriptions.tech: Discover Taiwan tech and electronics brands connected to the island's hardware, design, and manufacturing strengths. From useful gadgets to creator tools, these products show how engineering and everyday needs meet.

metadata.title: Glossary | Formoria
metadata.description: Definitions for terms used across Formoria — from what Made in Taiwan means to how trust badges work and how we organise the directory.

glossary.heading: Glossary
glossary.lede: Terms and definitions used across Formoria — from what 'Made in Taiwan' means to how trust badges work and how we organise the directory.

madeInTaiwan.definition: Primary design, manufacturing, or founding rooted in Taiwan — a commitment to craft, not just an origin label.

communityCurated.definition: Submitted and reviewed by the community, not by an algorithm — every listing reflects a human decision.

mitVerified.definition: Registry-confirmed against the 微笑產品標章 — independently cross-checked, not self-reported.

ownerClaimed.definition: The brand owner has claimed and actively manages this listing — a live, maintained presence.

communityLabel.definition: Community-maintained with no owner claim and no registry check — always welcome to claim.

leather.definition: Full- or top-grain, vegetable-tanned leather — not synthetics.

ceramic.definition: Clay, porcelain, and stoneware, with strong roots in Yingge (鶯歌) heritage.

naturalFibre.definition: Cotton, linen, wool, silk, or bamboo — plant- or animal-sourced only.

accessible.definition: Everyday pricing, from NT$0 to NT$500.

midRange.definition: Considered purchases, from NT$500 to NT$3,000.

north.definition: Taipei, New Taipei, Taoyuan, Keelung — the island's design and fashion hub.

central.definition: Taichung, Changhua, Nantou — known for ceramics, tea, and woodwork.

south.definition: Tainan, Kaohsiung, Pingtung — artisan and food culture, the cultural capital.

slowMade.definition: Small-batch and handmade — a curatorial signal, not a certification.

ecoConscious.definition: A material commitment to environmental responsibility in sourcing, packaging, and waste.

familyRun.definition: Family-owned and operated, often across multiple generations.

metadata.title: Terms of Service | Formoria
metadata.description: Read Formoria's terms of service, including content ownership, data usage, brand review process, and disclaimer.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: Thank you for using Formoria. By using this platform, you agree to the following terms. Please read carefully before submitting brand information.

contentOwnership.heading: Content Ownership
contentOwnership.body: Brand information you submit to Formoria (including name, description, images, links, etc.) must be content you legally own or have the right to use. By submitting, you grant Formoria a non-exclusive, royalty-free license to display and promote the content on this platform for the purpose of showcasing Taiwanese brands.

dataUse.heading: Data Usage
dataUse.body: Brand data collected by Formoria is used solely to build the Taiwanese brand directory and provide brand discovery features. We do not sell your personal information or brand data to third parties. Data use is governed by these terms and our privacy policy.

reviewProcess.heading: Brand Review Process
reviewProcess.body: All submitted brand information is subject to manual review before being published. Formoria reserves the right to reject or remove any brand information that does not meet our platform standards, without liability to the submitter. Approval does not constitute endorsement or certification of the brand by Formoria.

disclaimer.heading: Disclaimer
disclaimer.body: Formoria provides this service as-is and makes no warranties regarding the completeness, accuracy, or timeliness of content on the platform. Formoria is not liable for any direct or indirect losses arising from the use of this platform.

changes.heading: Changes to Terms
changes.body: Formoria reserves the right to modify these terms at any time. Significant changes will be announced on the platform. Continued use of the service constitutes acceptance of the updated terms. If you have questions, please contact us via the contact page.

metadata.title: Support Formoria
metadata.description: Formoria is an independently run directory of Made-in-Taiwan brands. No ads, no listing fees. If it is useful to you, consider buying me a coffee.

hero.title: Help more Taiwan brands get found
hero.body: Formoria is an independently run directory of Made-in-Taiwan brands. No ads, no listing fees, ranked by content and never by payment. If it's useful to you, a coffee helps keep it going.

discover.title: Finding & verifying brands
discover.body: Sourcing and curating each brand by hand so the directory stays real and complete.

hosting.title: Keeping the site running
hosting.body: Covering hosting, image storage, and domains so it stays fast and free.

neutral.title: Staying neutral & ad-free
neutral.body: No ads and no listing fees, so the space stays for genuinely good brands.

otherWays.heading: Other ways to help
otherWays.submit: Recommend a Taiwan brand you love

metadata.title: FAQ
metadata.description: Frequently asked questions about the Formoria Taiwanese brand directory — learn what Made in Taiwan means, how to submit a brand, the review process, and how to claim your brand page.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.intro: Here are the most common questions we receive. If you still have questions, feel free to reach out via the contact information at the bottom of the page.

whatIsFormoria.question: What is Formoria?
whatIsFormoria.answer: Formoria is a community-driven directory of Taiwanese brands dedicated to helping people discover and support quality Made in Taiwan products. Whether you're a consumer looking to explore local brands or a brand owner hoping to reach more people, Formoria is your starting point.

whatDoesMitMean.question: What does "MIT" mean?
whatDoesMitMean.answer: "MIT" stands for Made in Taiwan. The brands listed on Formoria are primarily manufactured in Taiwan — including brands that are designed, produced, or founded in Taiwan. We care not just about the origin label, but about the craftsmanship and story behind each brand.

howToSubmit.question: How do I submit a brand to Formoria?
howToSubmit.answer: Anyone can submit a brand using our submission form. Go to the Submit a Brand page, fill in the brand's basic information, official website, social media links, and more. Once submitted, the Formoria team will review the listing. There is no fee — we evaluate submissions based solely on quality and authenticity.

reviewTime.question: How long does the brand review take?
reviewTime.answer: In most cases, brand reviews take about 7 business days. During that time, our team verifies the brand's authenticity and its connection to Made in Taiwan. Once approved, the brand will appear in the directory. If the submission is incomplete, we may reach out by email to request additional information.

claimOrUpdate.question: I'm the brand owner — how do I claim or update my brand page?
claimOrUpdate.answer: If you are the brand owner or an authorized representative, please email us with the brand name and proof of identity. Our team will verify your identity and help you update or claim your brand listing. Please write to the contact email at the bottom of the page.

dataAccuracy.question: How is the accuracy of brand information ensured?
dataAccuracy.answer: Formoria collects brand information through community contributions and our admin team performs an initial review during the approval process. If you find any brand information that is incorrect or outdated, please let us know through our contact channel and we'll address it promptly.

contact.question: How do I contact the Formoria team?
contact.answer: For any questions, suggestions, or partnership inquiries, please email: <mail>{email}</mail>. Our team typically responds within 2–3 business days.

metadata.title: About Formoria | Made-in-Taiwan Brand Directory
metadata.description: Formoria helps quality Made-in-Taiwan brands get found through a community-curated directory built for discovery, craft, and care.

hero.title: Putting Taiwan's best brands on the world map.
hero.subtitle: A community-curated directory for discovering quality Made-in-Taiwan brands, from everyday staples to thoughtful design.

origin.heading: Why Formoria Exists
origin.quote: I kept looking for Taiwan online and finding pieces, not a place.
origin.body1: I am a Taiwanese founder who spent years abroad trying to find the brands that made home feel close: pantry staples, design objects, daily goods, and small labels I trusted but could not easily explain to friends.
origin.body2: My background is in technology for small businesses, where I saw the same pattern again and again. Many independent brands already have the quality, taste, and care. What they lack is a simple way to be found by people who are already looking for something better.
origin.body3: Formoria began as a quiet answer to that gap: a focused, anonymous founder-led directory for Taiwan's best brands, built so the work can stand in front of the biography.

whatIsMit.heading: What is Made in Taiwan?
whatIsMit.body1: Made in Taiwan is more than a mark of origin. It carries a history of reliability, practical craft, and constant improvement across food, home, beauty, apparel, design, and technology.
whatIsMit.body2: On Formoria, MIT means a brand is founded, designed, produced, or deeply rooted in Taiwan. We look for real connection, considered quality, and a story worth helping more people discover.

mission.heading: Our Mission
mission.statement: Our mission is to help quality Made-in-Taiwan brands get found — and put Taiwan on the map for design, craft, and care.

promote.heading: Promote Taiwanese Brands
promote.body: Make it easier for people around the world to discover Taiwanese brands with strong products, thoughtful stories, and a real connection to place.

smallBusiness.heading: Support Small Businesses
smallBusiness.body: Give independent makers, family businesses, and emerging labels another path to visibility without asking them to become something they are not.

platform.heading: Build a Discovery Platform
platform.body: Create a clean, trusted place where shoppers, travelers, editors, and diaspora communities can find Taiwan-made brands worth remembering.

submit.label: Share a brand
submit.description: Submit a Taiwan-rooted brand you love, whether it is your own business or one the community should know.

review.label: Curate with care
review.description: We review each submission for authenticity, quality signals, and a meaningful Made-in-Taiwan connection.

publish.label: Help it get found
publish.description: Approved brands join the directory with clear context so more people can discover, compare, and support them.

cta.heading: Find Taiwan-made brands worth coming back to.
